scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.expo: bash -c 'pnpm --filter @workspace/mobile exec expo "$@" && { [ -d artifacts/mobile/android ] && mv artifacts/mobile/android android || true; } && { [ -d artifacts/mobile/ios ] && mv artifacts/mobile/ios ios || true; } && bash .eas/setup-java.sh' --
scripts.eas:android:preview: cd artifacts/mobile && eas build -p android --profile preview
scripts.eas:android:production: cd artifacts/mobile && eas build -p android --profile production
scripts.eas:android:dev: cd artifacts/mobile && eas build -p android --profile development
scripts.eas:ios:preview: cd artifacts/mobile && eas build -p ios --profile preview
scripts.eas:ios:production: cd artifacts/mobile && eas build -p ios --profile production
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
